transcript: Speaker A: खरं तर मला ना कॉल जॉईन करायला खूप ऑकवर्ड वाटत होतं. [To be honest, I used to feel very awkward joining calls.] Speaker B: सेम मला पण वाटायचं सुरुवातीला. [Same, I also felt that way in the beginning.] Speaker A: पण आता सगळे शिकायला आलेत ना. [But now, everyone has come to learn, right?] Speaker B: हो, म्हणून हळूहळू कॉन्फिडन्स येतोय. [Yes, that's why confidence is slowly coming.] Speaker A: मग तू रोज प्रॅक्टिस करतोस? [So do you practice daily?] Speaker B: हो, आय प्रॅक्टिस डेली ॲटलीस्ट फॉर १५ टू २० मिनिट्स. [Yes, I practice daily at least for 15 to 20 minutes.] Speaker A: अरे वा! मस्त इंग्लिश बोलायला लागलायस की. [Oh wow! You've started speaking English so well.] Speaker A (Voiceover): MySivi ॲपवर १ कोटी लोक स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करतायत. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयात. [Over 1 crore people are practicing spoken English on the MySivi app. You should also start today. Trial for just 1 rupee.]
on_screen_text: MySivi AI English Speaking... 10M+ Downloads. MySivi Premium. LIMITED TIME OFFER. ₹1. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher. 500+ Exercises and Lessons. Unlimited Access.
summary: A woman and a man discuss how practicing English daily on the MySivi app helped build their confidence and overcome awkwardness. The ad highlights the app's popularity with over 10 million downloads and promotes a premium trial for just 1 rupee.
